_note: Proposal content extracted by Claude from consultants' attached proposal documents. Keyed by consultant name (as shown in the Semi-Final sheet). AED = as quoted, excl. tax (~1 AED = INR 23, indicative). INR quotes are excl. GST. Negotiation levers and next actions are decision-support suggestions, not directives.

H2R Design.firm: H2R Interior Design LLC — Dubai / London
H2R Design.disciplines: Interior Design + FF&E consultancy ONLY (common/FOH areas & units). Architecture, MEP, structure and construction/shop drawings NOT included (contractor does construction drawings).
H2R Design.understanding: ~10,379 sqm: two office floors (4,891 each) + terrace 597 sqm, Homeland luxury mall business tower, Amritsar. Benchmark Nasab by KOA. Optional food hall/F&B (subject to finalisation).
H2R Design.deliverables: Stage 1 Concept (8 wks): master planning + final concept (GA plan, flooring, shopfront + signage, digital sample board, 10 CGIs, FF&E). Stage 2 Development (10 wks): schematic (final layout, 4 CGIs, RCP w/ MEP provisions, electrical, lighting, finishes, sections, facade, physical sample board) + detail design & FF&E (schedules, final board, timeline). Stage 3 Post-design (TBC): construction admin (shop-drawing review, submittals, RFIs).
H2R Design.designFee: AED 910,000 excl. tax (Concept 450,000 + Development 450,000 + Post-design 10,000). ~INR 2.09 Cr.
H2R Design.supervision: Minimal — Phase 5 Construction Administration only (AED 10,000). Full supervision at monthly rates (Partner 101,600; Project Director 92,000).
H2R Design.payment: Per stage: 70% advance + 30% on completion. Invoices due 14 days.
H2R Design.revisions: 2 rounds per stage; AED 5,000 per extra round; AED 2,000/day for added services.
H2R Design.exclusions: Architecture, MEP, structure, construction/shop drawings (contractor); taxes; approvals/permits; 15% handling fee on third-party procurement.
H2R Design.termination: 30 days' notice; 10% of remaining-stage fees on early termination. Liability capped at fees paid.
H2R Design.negotiation: Interiors-only scope, so the headline is low but you must separately appoint architecture/MEP/structure + a contractor. Push on: the 15% procurement handling fee, the rendering-count inconsistency (5 vs 10+4), whether food hall/F&B is in or out. 60-day validity gives negotiating room.
H2R Design.nextAction: Use as the interiors benchmark; confirm the surrounding consultant stack and align scope boundaries with the contractor's construction-drawing responsibility before award.

Tzed Architect.firm: T.ZED Architects FZ LLC — Dubai (DDA registered)
Tzed Architect.disciplines: FULL multidisciplinary — Architecture, Interior Architecture, MEP, Structure, AoR, FLS, and site supervision.
Tzed Architect.understanding: Co-working over 3 floors: 18th 3,460 m2, 19th 3,460 m2, terrace 3,612 m2 (~10,532 m2), Homeland Global Park.
Tzed Architect.deliverables: A-1 Concept (3 wks): arch+interior+MEP concept, 3D sketch-up. A-2 Schematic+approvals (6 wks): GA plans, elevations, sections, schedules, RCP & lighting, FF&E schedule, 5 renders + 3 montages, cost plan, MEP/structure. A-3 Detailed (8 wks): 1:50/1:20 production drawings, detailed specs, FF&E specs, statutory docs. B-1 Construction (4–5 mo): 2 visits/wk + ID 5 days/wk finishing, RFI/MAF, QA/QC, testing, snag, handover.
Tzed Architect.renderings: 10 rendered 3D views; extra views AED 6,500 each.
Tzed Architect.designFee: AED 2,250,000 excl. VAT (Stage A, all disciplines). ~INR 5.18 Cr.
Tzed Architect.total: AED 2,250,000 design (excl. VAT) + AED 45,000/month supervision · ~INR 5.18 Cr design
Tzed Architect.supervision: Extensive — Stage B AED 45,000/month (~INR 10.4 L/mo) for ~4–5 months; 2 weekly site visits (capped 3 hrs) + full-time off-site coordination.
Tzed Architect.payment: 20% on signing · 30% after A-1 · 30% after A-2 · 20% after A-3. Stage B billed monthly.
Tzed Architect.revisions: 5 included, then hourly (Director Architect AED 1,000/hr; Site Architect 650; MEP/Structural 500; CAD 300).
Tzed Architect.exclusions: Authority fees & permits (client); construction/shop drawings (contractor); travel outside UAE; soil/survey (client); specialist facade/curtain-wall; special security.
Tzed Architect.termination: 14 days' notice; paid to termination date. Abandoned after 60 days' suspension.
Tzed Architect.negotiation: Full-service premium at AED 2.25m + 45k/mo supervision. Act fast on the 7-day validity — request an extension immediately. Negotiable: supervision monthly rate and duration, extra-render charge, and confirm the depth of in-house MEP/structure vs sub-consulted.
Tzed Architect.nextAction: Compare single-vendor (T.ZED) vs multi-vendor (separate arch + interior + structure like PICE/JW). Lock validity and fee before it lapses, then decide the delivery model.

PICE (Ajay gupta).firm: PICE — Ajay Gupta (Structural Design Consultant, India)
PICE (Ajay gupta).disciplines: Structural Design Consultancy for HLP Galleria, Sector 62, Mohali (super-structure + substructure).
PICE (Ajay gupta).understanding: HLP Galleria: super-structure 29,27,880 sq.ft + substructure 7,43,731 sq.ft (areas indicative, pending sanction).
PICE (Ajay gupta).deliverables: Concept: structural options + Design Basis Report. Schematic: framing plans (80–90% member sizing), DBR closure, ballpark BOQ. Design Development: foundation freezing, final framing (ETABS), civil quantities (excl. masonry). Construction: GFC/execution drawings + reinforcement details.
PICE (Ajay gupta).payment: 10% advance · 10% concept · 10% schematic · 10% authority · 5% BOQ/tender · 10% foundation · 10% up to ground floor · 20% super-structure (2 stages) · 15% during execution.
PICE (Ajay gupta).revisions: Scope changes to be discussed before proceeding; not itemised.
PICE (Ajay gupta).exclusions: Bar bending schedule/shop drawings, shuttering/temp works, earth-retention design, vetting fees, BIM, D-wall design, sample flat/sales gallery, supervision.
PICE (Ajay gupta).termination: Not stated. Contract period per RERA timelines; taxes extra; outside-NCR travel reimbursed.
PICE (Ajay gupta).negotiation: Lowest structural quote (₹1.52 Cr — about half of JW). Before leaning on price, confirm scope parity: BIM, D-wall and earth-retention are excluded (add if needed). No stated validity — lock the ₹4.25/₹3.75 rates in writing; no stated liability cap — request a professional-indemnity cap; confirm GFC/ETABS deliverables and RERA-aligned timelines.
PICE (Ajay gupta).nextAction: Shortlist as the low-cost structural option. Issue a scope-clarification (BIM, earth retention, supervision) and secure a rate hold + liability terms before award.

JW Consultants.disciplines: Structural Engineering Services for HLP Galleria (13 towers, ~70 m, mixed-use).
JW Consultants.understanding: HLP Galleria 12.92 acre, Sector 62, Mohali: tower area 29,27,880 sq.ft + basement 7,43,731 sq.ft.
JW Consultants.deliverables: Concept (load paths, systems, materials). Schematic (geotech coordination, alternative schemes with merits/demerits, initial DBR, concept framing). Design Development (final framing, authority submissions, detailed DBR). Construction ('Certified for Design Adequacy' drawings). Completion (assist completion certificate).
JW Consultants.designFee: Tower ₹9.00/sq.ft + Non-tower ₹6.50/sq.ft (actual constructed slab area), excl. GST. On stated areas ≈ ₹3.12 Cr (₹2,63,50,920 + ₹48,34,252). BIM +₹2.00/sq.ft optional.
JW Consultants.total: ≈ ₹3,11,85,172 (excl. GST) · ~₹3.12 Cr (₹9.00/₹6.50 per sq.ft; BIM +₹2/sq.ft optional)
JW Consultants.supervision: Not included — only verification of reinforcement on site if specifically requested.
JW Consultants.payment: 7.5% initial · 7.5% concept · 10% schematic · 10% tender · 15% design development · 25% working drawings · 20% RCC construction · 5% completion/stability certificate.
JW Consultants.validity: Rates valid 45 days. Fees fixed 3 years, then +15% on balance.
JW Consultants.revisions: Design-input changes → rework at separately agreed fees.
JW Consultants.exclusions: Local Engineer on Record (client); travel (client; business class for partners); supervision; peer review/value engineering (separate agency).
JW Consultants.termination: Not stated. Liability capped at 10% of aggregate contract value; indemnity via Professional Liability Policy.
JW Consultants.negotiation: Roughly 2x PICE (₹9 / ₹6.50 per sq.ft). Benchmark against PICE's ₹4.25/₹3.75 to seek a reduction. Note BIM is chargeable extra (₹2/sq.ft), validity is only 45 days (extend), and travel is billed to client with business-class partner fares (cap it). The 10% liability cap and 3-year rate hold are pluses.
JW Consultants.nextAction: Ask for a revised fee referencing the market/PICE rate; establish whether the premium buys added value (13-tower/70 m experience, peer-review support) before deciding JW vs PICE on price-vs-track-record.

Oracle.firm: Oracles Landscape Architecture, Planning & Design — New Delhi (est. 1997; Suneet Mohindru, Principal)
Oracle.disciplines: Landscape design & documentation, quantity surveying, and coordination/review — Group Housing on the Sector-62 Mohali (HLP) 12.92-acre site.
Oracle.understanding: Landscape scope quoted for both HLP Sector-62 Mohali (12.92 acres) and Amritsar Ranjeet Avenue MV23+RJC (11.25 acres) — same ₹75 L + GST lump sum, 3-stage scope.
Oracle.deliverables: Stage A Concept & Schematic (A-1 concept/theme, A-2 schematic). Stage B Detail Design. Stage C Construction (C-1 documentation hard/soft, C-2 administration). Includes master/site planning, soft & hard landscape design, planting policies, landscape structures (structural working details excluded), BoQ & budgetary costing, consultant coordination, and periodic construction-stage site review.
Oracle.renderings: Physical models, 3D drawings and walk-throughs charged extra (not included).
Oracle.designFee: ₹75,00,000 + GST (lump sum; no per-sq.ft rate). ~₹75 L.
Oracle.supervision: Construction administration / periodic site review included in Stage C. Outstation (non-NCR) site visits reimbursable at actuals.
Oracle.payment: Package 1 (35%): 10% on appointment · 7.5% concept presentation · 7.5% concept finalisation · 10% schematic. Package 2 (65%): detail design (hard/soft/final) + construction documentation (hard/soft) + construction administration + 5% on virtual completion.
Oracle.validity: 4 years from acceptance of the work order.
Oracle.revisions: Stage-wise consolidated client comments expected; revisions not separately itemised.
Oracle.exclusions: MEP, structural design, project/contract management, liaison & approvals; surveys/measured drawings; irrigation, signage, water-body/fountain/aquaria engineering; municipal sanction & survey costs (extra as actual); physical models, 3D and walk-throughs (charged extra); fees of other consultants.
Oracle.termination: Escalation as mutually agreed (revises total). GST extra; TDS per Income Tax Act. Outstation travel/stay reimbursed at actuals.
Oracle.negotiation: Lump-sum ₹75 L + GST for landscape only (excludes MEP/structure and models/3D). Levers: cap the 3D/walk-through and outstation-travel extras; 4-year validity is generous; confirm the depth of quantity-surveying/BoQ and whether water features / specialist items (charged extra) are actually needed.
Oracle.nextAction: Benchmark against other landscape quotes (Cooper Hills, IE Design, SHMA, L49); confirm inclusions (models, site visits, BoQ) and lock the lump sum + escalation basis before award.

PARK ASSOCIATES.firm: Park + Associates Pte Ltd — Singapore (Lim Koon Park, Principal; SIA terms)
PARK ASSOCIATES.disciplines: Architectural consultancy — masterplanning, placemaking and concept design for 'Homeland One Up' hillside mixed-use development, Dharampur, HP (~18 acres). (Sheet lists under Facade; proposal is architectural masterplan/concept.)
PARK ASSOCIATES.understanding: ~18-acre integrated hillside community: residential apartments, villas, clubhouses, wellness, banquet/pool, destination F&B. P+A engaged to review/refine/elevate the existing local-team masterplan.
PARK ASSOCIATES.deliverables: Phase 1A Masterplan Review (3 wks): review report, placemaking & development strategy, planning diagrams. Phase 1B Concept Design (11 wks): design narrative, 2 concept options per component, architectural plans/elevations/sections, façade & material strategy, hospitality interior concept, artists' impressions, up to 2 iterations. Option B adds Phase 2 Schematic (16 wks) + Phase 3 Design Development (14 wks) with drawings, guidelines, façade package and coordination drawings for the local architect.
PARK ASSOCIATES.renderings: In-house artists' impressions; physical models excluded.
PARK ASSOCIATES.designFee: USD 228,000 (Option A: masterplan + concept) or USD 488,000 (Option B: through design development), excl. GST/withholding tax. ~INR 1.9 Cr / ~INR 4.05 Cr (@ ~₹83/USD).
PARK ASSOCIATES.total: USD 228,000 (Opt A) / USD 488,000 (Opt B), excl. GST · ~₹1.9 Cr / ~₹4.05 Cr
PARK ASSOCIATES.supervision: Excluded — no GFC drawings, construction management or standing supervision (main contractor). Optional design-guardianship (review only) in later stages if separately engaged.
PARK ASSOCIATES.payment: Option A: 10% appointment · 20% Phase 1A · 35% concept options · 35% final concept. Option B: 10 · 10 · 20 · 20 · 15 · 10 · 10 · 5 (%). Invoices due 30 days; 1.2%/month interest on late payment.
PARK ASSOCIATES.validity: Not stated (SIA Conditions of Appointment apply).
PARK ASSOCIATES.revisions: Up to 2 concept options per component + 2 iterations per major submission; extra revisions billed hourly (SGD: Principal $320, Partner $175, Designer $125).
PARK ASSOCIATES.exclusions: GFC/construction drawings; construction management/supervision; other consultants (C&S, MEP, QS, landscape, interior beyond concept, lighting/acoustics/wayfinding/sustainability/kitchen/AV-IT/security); FF&E procurement; physical models; statutory & authority fees; surveys/soil/utility investigations.
PARK ASSOCIATES.termination: SIA terms; suspension >30 days → staff-cost + recommencement fee; suspension >6 months → +5% on outstanding fees. Copyright retained by architect (client may reuse on the same property only). Overseas travel reimbursable (business class >4 hrs).
PARK ASSOCIATES.negotiation: Two-tier USD quote — Option A (concept only, USD 228k) vs Option B (through design development, USD 488k); decide how far you actually need P+A vs a local architect. Levers: no stated validity — request one; travel (business class) and extra iterations are chargeable — cap them; clarify that façade/masterplan concept here is NOT full architecture (GFC excluded).
PARK ASSOCIATES.nextAction: Confirm whether the brief needs concept-only (Opt A) or through-DD (Opt B); align P+A's design-intent role with a local architect of record for GFC; lock validity and the USD-INR basis before award.

Yodezeen.firm: Yodezeen — Architecture & Interior Design studio (offices in Dubai, London, Miami, Warsaw, Kyiv, Milan; est. 2010)
Yodezeen.disciplines: Architectural concept + Interior design (design-consultant role) for the Dharampur mixed-use residential development.
Yodezeen.understanding: Mixed-use residential, Dharampur: commercial/restaurant/wellness/banquet-pool amenities, 5BHK luxury villa, and typical units across blocks (1–4 BHK).
Yodezeen.deliverables: Architectural concept: site analysis, masterplan, facade concept + full 3D exterior renderings, material specs, architectural details. Interior: concept (layout + 3D renderings, 2 stages), schematic (GA/floor plans, RCP, lighting/electrical/plumbing layouts), detailed development (elevations, sections, joinery details), FF&E documentation (schedules, cut-sheets, sample boards, furniture/lighting selection with cost estimates & lead times). Coordinates with the Architect of Record and other client-appointed consultants.
Yodezeen.renderings: Full facade/exterior 3D renderings + interior 3D renderings (concept in 2 stages).
Yodezeen.designFee: USD 764,750 excl. VAT (Architectural concept $310,000 + Interior design $454,750). ~INR 6.35 Cr. City submittals/permits extra. Some amenity areas (wellness, banquet/pool) marked TBC.
Yodezeen.supervision: Not covered — design-consultant role only; coordinates with the Architect of Record.
Yodezeen.payment: Staged per component: advance on signing, progress on 3D renderings / each design stage, final on completion (architectural concept, villa, and each interior package).
Yodezeen.validity: ~7 days — stated project start (7 Sep 2026) is valid for one week after proposal issue.
Yodezeen.revisions: Adjustment time agreed with client after each stage; not itemised.
Yodezeen.exclusions: VAT; city submittals & permits; construction/GFC drawings; MEP/structural engineering; Architect of Record and other consultants (client-appointed).
Yodezeen.negotiation: Premium concept + interior at USD 764,750 (~₹6.35 Cr) — among the most expensive interior options; scope is design-only (no GFC/MEP/structure and needs a local Architect of Record). Levers: 7-day validity — extend immediately; wellness & banquet/pool areas are TBC (unpriced) — pin the full number; VAT/permits extra; negotiate the $100–150/m2 interior rate.
Yodezeen.nextAction: Benchmark against other interior/architect concepts (H2R, Park + Associates, Bentel); confirm the TBC amenity areas and total, lock validity, and settle the Architect-of-Record split before award.

Warrior Group.firm: ERA Architects — Mumbai (NOTE: this row is 'Warrior Group / Tilt', but its attachment folder holds ERA Architects' Auditorium & Cinema proposals — the sheet link appears mismatched).
Warrior Group.disciplines: Interior design consultancy for a single Auditorium (~1,118 seats, ~3,896 m²) at Homeland Global Park — sightlines, seating, auditorium & backstage interiors. Folder also contains ERA's 7-screen Cinema interior proposal.
Warrior Group.understanding: Single auditorium, ~1,118 seating capacity, ~3,896 m², at Homeland Global Park, Punjab.
Warrior Group.deliverables: Stage 1 Concept Design; Stage 2 Preliminary design & drawings; Stage 3 Tender drawings & BOQ documents; Stage 4 Working drawings + sample & shop-drawing approval + up to 3 site visits; Stage 5 As-built interior drawings.
Warrior Group.renderings: 2D/3D interior views + material/mood boards (per the cinema proposal).
Warrior Group.designFee: ₹25,00,000 + GST (auditorium interior design). A separate 7-screen Cinema interior proposal is also in the folder (fee not captured here).
Warrior Group.total: ₹25,00,000 + GST (auditorium) · ~₹25 L (separate cinema proposal also in folder)
Warrior Group.supervision: 3 site visits included; from the 4th visit the client pays travel + architect's time. No daily/continuous on-site supervision.
Warrior Group.payment: Progressive stage-wise payments (per proposal). Travel/hotel for all site visits paid by client.
Warrior Group.exclusions: Civil/structural design, firefighting & fire-life-safety, PHE (plumbing/drainage), HVAC, acoustical design, electrical & lighting design (incl. stage lighting), AV consultant, daily/continuous site supervision, QS/purchasing, signage graphics, local approvals & local architect (client-appointed).
Warrior Group.negotiation: IMPORTANT: this 'Warrior Group / Tilt' row is linked to ERA Architects' Auditorium/Cinema proposals — the sheet link looks mismatched; verify before using. Auditorium interior ₹25 L + GST. Levers: site-visit travel is billed from the 4th visit; a theatre/cinema needs acoustics, AV and stage-lighting which are all EXCLUDED here — budget those separately.
Warrior Group.nextAction: Fix the sheet link so this row points to the correct consultant's proposal. Confirm which ERA scope applies (auditorium vs 7-screen cinema), obtain the cinema fee, and ensure acoustics/AV/stage-lighting consultants are appointed separately.
